business_angle: RM ELECTRICAL - customers praise tidy finishes and quality workmanship in Leeds, LS4
distinctive_phrases: Excellent job done at a very fair price
Called Ryan who came round, quoted the job and completed it to a very high standard
Changed all spot lights in the kitchen, fixed a fault and swapped out two other light fittings
Ryan fitted a security light and did a great job
From the first communication, he was polite, friendly and punctual

strongest_review_quote.text: Called Ryan on a Thursday asking to come replace our induction hob, he asked if he could come over on the following Monday as he was busy until then, i explained how  I needed it sooner & despite being booked up he managed to fit the job in the very next day . Excellent job done at a very fair price.  Definitely recommend.
strongest_review_quote.author: David

best_photos_rationale: Google Places photos preferred for gallery when high quality
claims_to_avoid: Supplier names as job locations in captions
pitch_hook_summary: Lead with review detail about tidy finishes (David)
